benefits.description: Sleep steadily improving, averaging about 20 minutes more per night after approximately one month

side_effects.description: Sleep was going down after a week at 500mcg dose; reduced to 250mcg

protocol_notes: Started at 500mcg daily but sleep declined after a week; backed off to 250mcg daily. Has been taking for about a month total. Notes possible translation issue in original Russian papers regarding dosing (5-10mg in original study may refer to different formulation).
